pages.name: Home
pages.description: Conference landing page with overview and entry points into all major tasks, featuring highlighted tickets, sessions, exhibitors, and navigation into program, networking, travel, and on-demand content.
primary_functions: Introduce the conference theme, dates, and location
Provide primary calls-to-action for buying tickets, viewing the program, and planning travel
Offer quick links to Tickets & Pricing, Full Schedule, Workshops, Social & Networking, Exhibitors, Travel, On-Demand Library, Attendee Directory, My Schedule, and Meetings

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary CTA "Buy tickets" or "Tickets & Pricing"
Click CTA "View full program"
Click CTA or tile for "Hands-on Workshops"
Click CTA "Social & Networking"
Click CTA "Exhibitors & Sponsors"
Click CTA "Travel & Accommodation"
Click CTA "On-Demand Library"
Click CTA "Attendee Directory"
Click quick link "My Schedule"
Click quick link "Meetings"
Click cart icon in header from homepage

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry labeled "Home"
Footer link back to homepage
Direct access via root URL of the conference site

pages.name: Tickets & Pricing
pages.description: Catalog of all ticket and pass options with filters and sorting, used as the primary entry point into the purchase and registration flow.
primary_functions: List all available ticket types and passes with prices, durations, and inclusions
Filter tickets by pass duration (e.g., 1-day, 3-day), workshop credits, access level, and price range
Sort tickets by criteria such as price (low to high) or popularity
Open a specific pass in the ticket detail view for more information and purchase

incoming_params.description: Preselects the pass duration filter (e.g., 'three_day').
If set to 'includes_workshops', pre-filters passes that include workshop credits.
Preselects an access level such as 'standard', 'vip', or 'student'.
Sets an upper bound on total ticket price when loading the page.
Sets initial sort order such as 'price_low_to_high'.
Specifies which tickets result page to show.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a specific ticket/pass card
Click header cart icon or inline "View cart" link after adding a ticket
Click a prominent "Proceed to registration" button if shown on tickets page

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "Tickets & Pricing"
Footer link labeled "Tickets & Pricing"
CTAs and tiles from the homepage link directly to the tickets listing with pre-applied filters

pages.name: Ticket Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a single ticket or pass, used to inspect inclusions and start the purchase flow by adding the pass to the cart.
primary_functions: Display full pass details including duration, included days, workshop credits, and restrictions
Show price breakdown, taxes/fees, and total cost
Allow the user to select quantity and add the pass to the cart
Highlight key benefits and related options (e.g., upgrade paths)

incoming_params.description: ID of the TicketType to display.
Optional encoded URL or flag indicating how to navigate back to the tickets listing with preserved filters.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "View cart" or "Proceed to cart" after adding the pass
Click "Back to Tickets & Pricing" link

access_methods.description: Accessed when navigating from Tickets & Pricing or homepage with a ticketTypeId query parameter
Linked from featured ticket components on the homepage or marketing pages

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Basket for selected tickets/passes before registration and payment, summarizing items and allowing last-minute adjustments.
primary_functions: List all items added to the cart with individual and total pricing
Allow users to remove items or adjust quantities if applicable
Show summary of inclusions (e.g., workshop credits) for verification
Provide a clear call-to-action to proceed to the registration and attendee details page

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary button "Proceed to registration"
Click link "Continue browsing tickets"

access_methods.description: Header link/icon labeled "Cart"
Redirected here after adding items to cart when user chooses to view the cart

pages.name: Registration & Attendee Details
pages.description: Single-page registration and payment choice form shown after cart review, where attendee details are captured and an order is created.
primary_functions: Collect attendee information such as full name, email, and organization
Allow users to confirm or select specific conference days covered by their pass
Display an order summary referencing the items in the cart and total cost
Offer non-external payment options such as pay_on_site or invoice_me_later
Confirm registration and show a confirmation message/summary once completed

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to Home" after successful registration confirmation

access_methods.description: Accessed after clicking "Proceed to registration" on the Cart page
May also be accessed via saved URL if a cart already exists

pages.name: Full Schedule
pages.description: Filterable conference schedule across all days and tracks, supporting deep linking into specific filtered views of the program.
primary_functions: Display all conference sessions across days in a time-ordered schedule view
Filter sessions by day (e.g., day_1_june_12, day_2_june_13), session type (keynote, workshop, networking, etc.), track (e.g., ai_and_machine_learning), and time range
Search sessions by title, speaker, or keyword
Open individual sessions in the session detail view
Provide inline actions (where appropriate) to add or remove sessions from the user's schedule

incoming_params.description: Schedule view mode; 'full_schedule' is used by the header link.
Preselects a specific conference day such as 'day_1_june_12'.
Filters schedule to a session type like 'keynote' or 'workshop'.
Filters schedule to a specific track, e.g., 'ai_and_machine_learning'.
Initial visible start time (e.g., '09:00').
Initial visible end time (e.g., '17:00').
Initial search query for sessions (title, speaker, keyword).
Sort order for sessions (e.g., by time or popularity).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a session title in the schedule
Click "My Schedule" button or link from schedule

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "Program – Full Schedule"
Footer link labeled "Full Schedule"
Linked from homepage hero and other promotional content via deep links with filters

pages.name: Session / Event Detail
pages.description: Unified detail page for sessions, workshops, networking events, and on-demand recordings, supporting both live scheduling and watchlist actions.
primary_functions: Display comprehensive information for a single item, including session type (keynote, workshop, networking, on_demand), track, date, time, duration, room/location, and speakers/hosts
Show additional attributes such as difficulty level, price (for paid workshops), perks/amenities (e.g., free refreshments), or recording length and playback options
Allow the user to add or remove the item from their personal schedule for live sessions, workshops, and networking events
Allow the user to add or remove the item from their watchlist for on-demand recordings
Provide navigation back to the originating list (schedule, networking events, workshops, or on-demand library) while preserving filters when possible

incoming_params.description: ID of the live session/workshop/networking event to display.
ID of an on-demand session recording to display.
Indicates whether to load a 'live' session or 'on_demand' recording.
Encoded information about which listing view to return to and with which filters.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "View my schedule" after adding a live session to the schedule
Click "Back to On-Demand Library" for an on-demand recording
Click "Back to Full Schedule" when return_to indicates schedule
Click "Back to Networking Events" when return_to indicates networking list
Click "Back to Workshops" when return_to indicates workshops listing

access_methods.description: Accessed via sessionId or onDemandSessionId query parameter from any listing view

pages.name: My Schedule
pages.description: Personal agenda view aggregating all sessions, workshops, networking events, and exhibitor demos the user has added, grouped by day.
primary_functions: Present the user's selected sessions, workshops, networking events, and exhibitor demo bookings grouped by day and ordered by time
Allow users to remove items from their schedule and resolve time conflicts
Highlight key items such as keynotes or workshops for quick reference
Provide links from each scheduled item back to its detail page for more information

incoming_params.description: Specifies which conference day tab to focus when opening My Schedule.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a scheduled live session title
Click on an exhibitor demo booking entry
Click on a 1:1 attendee meeting entry
Click link "Manage all meetings" from My Schedule

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "My Schedule"
Footer link labeled "My Schedule"
Linked from schedule, networking, workshops, exhibitor, and attendee views after adding items

pages.name: Social & Networking Events
pages.description: Listing page for social and networking events associated with the conference, with filters for day, time, type, and perks such as free refreshments.
primary_functions: List social and networking events such as receptions, mixers, and meetups
Filter events by day, time range (e.g., evening after 17_00), event type (networking vs. other), and perks/amenities (e.g., free_refreshments)
Allow sorting or grouping events by start time or popularity
Open individual events in the session detail view for full information
Provide inline actions to add or remove events from the user's schedule

incoming_params.description: Section within Social & Networking; 'events' is used to show the events list.
Preselects a specific conference day, e.g., 'day_1_june_12'.
Initial time filter lower bound (e.g., '17:00' for evening events).
Initial time filter upper bound.
Comma-separated list of perk filters such as 'free_refreshments'.
Filters events by type, e.g., 'networking' or 'social_event'.
Sort order for events, such as by start time or popularity.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an event title in the networking events list
Click "View my schedule" after adding networking events

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "Social & Networking – Events"
Footer link labeled "Social & Networking"
Linked from homepage and schedule for evening or networking content

pages.name: Workshops Listing
pages.description: Catalog of all hands-on workshops with advanced filtering and sorting, including day, track, difficulty, duration, and price filters.
primary_functions: List all available workshops with key metadata such as title, track, difficulty, duration, and price
Filter workshops by day, track/topic, difficulty level, duration range (e.g., up_to_3_hours), and price range
Provide a keyword search (e.g., for design_thinking) to quickly locate relevant workshops
Sort workshops by price (low_to_high), difficulty, or start time
Open individual workshops in the session detail view for full descriptions and schedule actions

incoming_params.description: Preselects a conference day for workshop listing, e.g., 'day_2_june_13'.
Filters workshops by track, e.g., 'ux_and_design'.
Filters workshops by difficulty_level such as 'advanced'.
Maximum workshop duration in minutes (e.g., 180 for up to 3 hours).
Upper bound for workshop price filter.
Keyword search prefilled for workshops, e.g., 'design thinking'.
Sort order such as 'price_low_to_high' or by start time.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a workshop title from the list
Click "View my schedule" after adding a workshop

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "Program – Workshops"
Footer link labeled "Workshops"
Linked from homepage tiles and from the full schedule for more workshop-focused browsing

pages.name: Exhibitors & Sponsors Listing
pages.description: Directory of exhibitors and sponsors with filters for sponsor level, category, and ratings, to help users discover relevant AI tools and other solutions.
primary_functions: List all exhibitors and sponsors with their names, logos, sponsor levels, categories, and ratings
Filter exhibitors by sponsor level (e.g., gold), category/industry (e.g., ai_tools_and_platforms), and rating threshold (e.g., 4_0_plus)
Search exhibitors by name or keyword
Sort exhibitors by name, rating, or sponsor level
Open individual exhibitor profiles in the exhibitor detail view

incoming_params.description: Filters exhibitors by sponsor_level, e.g., 'gold'.
Filters exhibitors by category such as 'ai_tools_and_platforms'.
Minimum rating threshold (e.g., 4.0) for exhibitors.
Sort order such as 'rating_desc' or 'name'.
Which page of exhibitor results to show.
Search query used to filter exhibitors by name or keywords.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an exhibitor name or logo in the listing

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "Exhibitors & Sponsors"
Footer link labeled "Exhibitors & Sponsors"
Linked from homepage featured exhibitors section or marketing content

pages.name: Exhibitor Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a single exhibitor or sponsor, including profile information, bookmark controls, and demo booking tooling.
primary_functions: Display exhibitor information such as description, key products, sponsor level, rating, and booth location
Allow users to bookmark or save the exhibitor for later reference
Provide a demo or meeting booking tool where users can select a day (e.g., day_2_june_13) and a specific 15-minute time slot
Confirm demo bookings and add them to the user's schedule and meetings overview

incoming_params.description: ID of the exhibitor whose profile is being viewed.
Indicates which listing or context (e.g., exhibitors list, meetings overview) to return to.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "View all meetings" after booking a demo
Click "See in my schedule" after booking a demo
Click "Back to Exhibitors & Sponsors"

access_methods.description: Accessed with exhibitorId query parameter from the Exhibitors & Sponsors listing or meetings/schedule views

pages.name: Travel & Accommodation
pages.description: Planning hub for hotels and other travel information, with focus on nearby hotels around the venue and tools to save preferred options.
primary_functions: List recommended hotels in a Hotels section or tab with basic information such as name, nightly rate, distance from venue, rating, and key amenities
Filter hotels by distance from venue (e.g., within_1_km), maximum nightly rate, amenities (e.g., breakfast_included), and rating threshold (e.g., 4_0_plus)
Sort hotels by distance (nearest_first), price, or rating
Open individual hotels in the hotel detail view
Provide inline options to save or unsave hotels to the user's trip list

incoming_params.description: Which travel section to show; 'hotels' focuses on nearby hotels.
Maximum distance from venue in kilometers, e.g., 1 for within 1 km.
Maximum nightly rate filter (e.g., 220).
Amenity filter such as 'breakfast_included'.
Minimum hotel rating threshold, e.g., 4.0.
Sort order such as 'distance_asc' (nearest first).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a hotel card from the listing

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "Travel & Accommodation"
Footer link labeled "Travel & Accommodation"
Linked from homepage travel planning CTAs and external travel guidance pages

pages.name: Hotel Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a single hotel near the conference venue, providing full information and saving options.
primary_functions: Display detailed hotel information including photos, description, room options, amenities, nightly price, and distance from the venue
Show user rating, reviews summary, and map/location view if available
Allow the user to save or remove the hotel from their saved hotels or trip plan
Provide links back to the filtered Travel & Accommodation listing

incoming_params.description: ID of the hotel to display.
Encoded information allowing a return to the Travel & Accommodation listing with filters preserved.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to hotels" from the hotel detail page

access_methods.description: Accessed via hotelId query parameter when navigating from the Travel & Accommodation page

pages.name: On-Demand Library
pages.description: Collection of recorded sessions from current and past conference years, supporting filtering by year, track, duration, and popularity.
primary_functions: List on-demand session recordings with title, track, duration, and popularity metrics
Filter recordings by year (e.g., previous_year such as 2023), track (e.g., ux_and_design), and duration (e.g., up_to_30_minutes)
Sort recordings by most_popular, newest, or alphabetical order
Open individual recordings in the session detail view
Provide inline actions to add or remove sessions from the user's watchlist

incoming_params.description: Preselects a conference year whose recordings to display.
Filters recordings by track such as 'ux_and_design'.
Maximum duration of recordings, e.g., 30 for short sessions.
Sort order such as 'most_popular'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a recording title or thumbnail

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "On-Demand Library"
Footer link labeled "On-Demand Library"
Linked from homepage "Watch now" sections and from session follow-up emails

pages.name: Attendee Directory
pages.description: Searchable directory of conference attendees for networking purposes, with filters for role, company, and interests.
primary_functions: List attendees with key fields such as name, role, company, and interests
Filter attendees by role (e.g., ux_designer), company, location, or interests
Search attendees by name or keyword
Open individual attendee profiles in the attendee profile view for more details and meeting requests

incoming_params.description: Filters directory to a specific role such as 'UX Designer'.
Filters attendees by company name.
Comma-separated list of interest tags to filter attendees.
Search query for attendee name or keywords.
Which page of directory results to show.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an attendee name in the directory

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "Social & Networking – Attendee Directory"
Footer link labeled "Attendee Directory"
Linked from homepage networking sections and emails encouraging 1:1 meetings

pages.name: Attendee Profile
pages.description: Detail view of a single attendee, used to understand their background and request 1:1 meetings.
primary_functions: Show attendee information including name, role, company, bio, and interests
Provide a 'Request 1_1 meeting' or 'Schedule meeting' action
Offer a meeting scheduler that allows users to pick a day (e.g., day_2_june_13), start time, and duration (e.g., 20_minutes)
Confirm meeting requests and add them to the user's meetings overview and personal schedule

incoming_params.description: ID of the attendee whose profile is being viewed.
Indicates which view to return to after scheduling a meeting.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "View all meetings" after requesting a 1:1 meeting
Click "See in my schedule" after requesting a meeting
Click "Back to Attendee Directory"

access_methods.description: Accessed with attendeeId query parameter from Attendee Directory, Meetings overview, or My Schedule

pages.name: Meetings & Networking Overview
pages.description: Central place to review and manage 1:1 meetings and exhibitor demos, including status and links back to related profiles.
primary_functions: List all scheduled and requested 1_1 meetings with attendees and demo bookings with exhibitors, including date, time, duration, and counterpart name/company
Show the status of each meeting (e.g., requested, confirmed, canceled)
Allow users to view details of each meeting and navigate to the related exhibitor or attendee profile
Provide options to cancel or modify meeting requests when allowed by conference rules

incoming_params.description: Pre-filters meetings to a given conference day.
Filter meetings by status such as 'requested' or 'confirmed'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the attendee name in an attendee_meeting entry
Click on the exhibitor name in an exhibitor_demo entry
Click link "Back to My Schedule" or "View in my schedule"

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "Meetings"
Linked from My Schedule, Exhibitor Detail, and Attendee Profile after creating meetings or demos

header_links.description: Homepage with conference overview and main entry points
Browse and filter all conference passes and ticket options
View the full multi-day conference schedule
Browse the attendee directory for networking
Explore exhibitors and sponsors and book demos
Find nearby hotels and travel options
Watch or save recorded sessions from current and past years
View and manage your personal conference agenda
Review and manage your 1:1 meetings and demos
Review selected tickets before registration and payment
